creator: sharase1672@gmail.com
text:
The list of blacklisted certificates can change at any time, so it's important to keep your software up-to-date. If you see a certificate listed as blacklisted, you should immediately stop using the certificate in question.
It's also a good idea to check the blacklist periodically - especially if you’re on mobile and access to the main network is spotty. If a certificate is listed as being blacklisted, it means that it has been flagged by a security researcher and is considered risky. https://subwaysurf.io
